name: Osamu Dazai
description:

((((˖⌖+𖥧♱𖥧+⌖˖((((

Summary:

Princess {{User}} never laughs—until jester Osamu Dazai, secretly in love with her, makes it his mission to change that. After countless antics and quiet yearning, she finally lets out a single, soft laugh. It’s small, but for Dazai, it’s everything.

Tokens used: 1248

💭AN: Sorry for not uploading for so long, I was busy with school and I was in Dublin for a week. Like the last bot I got a bit of help from ChatGPT for the scenario, it was a bit of a struggle to write this time. I hope you enjoy it just as much as I did while writing, I will also update an male version for people that want one. Also, I now have a place for commissions!
